ocl:
context Firmware
inv: self.devices->size() >= 2 and self.devices->size() <= 2

context AccessPolicy
inv: self.roles->notEmpty() implies self.roles->sortedBy(x | x.roleName)->first().roleName <= self.roles->sortedBy(x | x.roleName)->last().roleName

context AccessPolicy
inv: self.description.size() >= 10 implies self.description.substring(1, 10) = 'value'

context DataStream
inv: self.alertRules->notEmpty() implies self.alertRules->sortedBy(x | x.condition)->first().condition <= self.alertRules->sortedBy(x | x.condition)->last().condition

context Device
inv: self.tickets->notEmpty() implies self.tickets->sortedBy(x | x.ticketId)->first().ticketId <= self.tickets->sortedBy(x | x.ticketId)->last().ticketId

context Firmware
inv: self.devices->size() >= 4 implies self.devices->asSequence()->at(4).deviceId <> null

context Location
inv: self.site <> '' and self.site.size() > 0

context Device
inv: self.dataStreams->forAll(x, y | x <> y implies x.topic <> y.topic)

context IoTPlatform
inv: self.networks->notEmpty() implies self.networks->last().networkId <> null

context APIKey
inv: self.value <> '' and self.value.size() > 0

context Role
inv: self.policies->notEmpty() implies self.policies->sortedBy(x | x.rulesJson)->first().rulesJson <= self.policies->sortedBy(x | x.rulesJson)->last().rulesJson

context AccessPolicy
inv: self.roles->notEmpty() implies self.roles->last().roleName <> null

context OTAUpdate
inv: (self.targetDevice <> null) and (not(self.targetDevice <> null))

context User
inv: (self.alerts->collect(x | x.alertId)->notEmpty()) and (not(self.alerts->collect(x | x.alertId)->notEmpty()))

context Gateway
inv: (self.connectedEdges->isUnique(x | x.memoryMB)) and (not(self.connectedEdges->isUnique(x | x.memoryMB)))

context Role
inv: (self.users->isUnique(x | x.name)) and (not(self.users->isUnique(x | x.name)))

context User
inv: (self.roles->forAll(x, y | x <> y implies x.roleName <> y.roleName)) and (not(self.roles->forAll(x, y | x <> y implies x.roleName <> y.roleName)))

context Network
inv: (self.links->notEmpty() implies self.links->sortedBy(x | x.bandwidthKbps)->first().bandwidthKbps <= self.links->sortedBy(x | x.bandwidthKbps)->last().bandwidthKbps) and (not(self.links->notEmpty() implies self.links->sortedBy(x | x.bandwidthKbps)->first().bandwidthKbps <= self.links->sortedBy(x | x.bandwidthKbps)->last().bandwidthKbps))

context DataStream
inv: (self.records->includesAll(self.records) or self.records->excludesAll(self.records)) and (not(self.records->includesAll(self.records) or self.records->excludesAll(self.records)))

context Network
inv: (self.links->notEmpty() implies self.links->sortedBy(x | x.linkId)->first().linkId <= self.links->sortedBy(x | x.linkId)->last().linkId) and (not(self.links->notEmpty() implies self.links->sortedBy(x | x.linkId)->first().linkId <= self.links->sortedBy(x | x.linkId)->last().linkId))

context AccessPolicy
inv: (self.description <> '' and self.description.size() > 0) and (not(self.description <> '' and self.description.size() > 0))
